data.body: FIXED + re-pushed 385-388 (crossover ratchet). New stack tip d9e0f0e73 (15 commits). 385 amended (Change-Id I54e2e27 preserved): module-size-allowlist.txt=bare paths (old gate compat), new module-size-ceilings.txt=ratchet (reconcile.py pinned 1083=max-in-stack), BOTH gerrit-verify.yaml AND test.yml module-size steps rewritten to the two-file ratchet, contract test updated (5 pass). Both old+new gate simulations green at 385 and HEAD trees; reconcile.py 1064<1083. 386/387/388 cherry-picked (only conflict: 388's allowlist ceiling-drop, resolved by keeping bare version). Backup: janitor-backup-pre9cf3fix (=old tip 2c47c7c06). Gerrit push SUCCESS, stale Verified-1 removed, CI re-running. Now implementing remaining 4: 5274->7c92->9f40->44be.
